name: BetterFolders
description: عرض سيرفرات المجلد في شريط جانبي مخصص

settings.sidebar: Display سيرفرات from folder on dedicated sidebar
settings.closeAllFolders: Close all folders when selecting a سيرفر not in a folder
settings.closeAllHomeButton: Close all folders when clicking on the home button
settings.closeOthers: Close other folders when opening a folder
settings.forceOpen: Force a folder to open when switching to a سيرفر of that folder
settings.keepIcons: Keep showing سيرفر icons in the primary سيرفر bar folder when it
settings.showFolderIcon: Show the folder icon above the folder سيرفرات in the BetterFolders sidebar
